name: Number sense
description: Approximate quantity comparison and small-number recognition before formal counting.

name: Counting
description: Exact quantity through ordered count words or marks and one-to-one correspondence.

name: Pattern recognition
description: Recognition of repetition, growth, symmetry, recurrence, and order.

name: Spatial reasoning
description: Reasoning about shape, boundary, distance, orientation, and construction.

name: Symbolic representation
description: External marks, tokens, numerals, diagrams, and formulas that stabilize thought.

name: Computation
description: Executable procedures for counting, transforming, searching, and testing patterns.
